TrGatewayConfigurations.BCConfigurations:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.bcdk.BCDKConfigurationInfo"> 
  <void property="JCAAdapterConfig"> 
   <string><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ESBAdapterConfigurations>
    <ConnectionLess>false</ConnectionLess>
    <isConfigurationRequired>true</isConfigurationRequired>
    <isLicensed>true</isLicensed>
    <Inbound>false</Inbound>
    <AdapterInstanceProperties><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ESBAdapterInstanceProperties"> 
  <void property="GUID"> 
   <string>DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="appName"> 
   <string>DT</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="appVersion"> 
   <string>1_0</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="domain"> 
   <string>BCConfigPropertySheet</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="instanceName"> 
   <string>DB1</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="logCategories"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.spi.outbound.DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>DBServiceDefaultErrorHandler</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>DBServiceDefaultErrorHandler</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>DBServiceDefaultErrorHandler</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.db.DBServiceDefaultErrorHandler</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>DBServiceErrorHandlerImpl</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>DBServiceErrorHandlerImpl</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>DBServiceErrorHandlerImpl</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.DBServiceErrorHandlerImpl</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>DBInteraction</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>DBInteraction</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>DBInteraction</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.cci.DBInteraction</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></AdapterInstanceProperties>
    <ConfigurationObjects>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.cci.ESBConnectionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="MCFClassName"> 
    <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.spi.outbound.DBManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.cci.ESBConnectionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.cci.ConnectionSpec</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.cci.DBInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1300</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorActionsMap"> 
     <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>2</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>1</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>3</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>1</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="active"> 
           <boolean>true</boolean> 
          </void> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>4</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="active"> 
           <boolean>true</boolean> 
          </void> 
          <void property="noOfRetries"> 
           <int>10</int> 
          </void> 
          <void property="repeatInterval"> 
           <long>300000</long> 
          </void> 
          <void property="sendErrorAfterTries"> 
           <int>2</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>0</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"/> 
      </void> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>DB</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>DT__1_0__DB1</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="targetNamespace"> 
    <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/DB1</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category"> 
   <string>DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>The DBAdapter is a Query Engine that creates and executes a single SQL Statement or a set of queries to perform the database related operations such as insertion, updation, deletion; stored procedure execution; or table monitoring</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>dbcomponent.png</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.cci.DBInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.cci.InteractionSpec</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.spi.outbound.DBManagedConnectionFactory</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="DBVendor"> 
    <string>HSQL</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="JNDIName"> 
    <string>DB</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1100</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="databaseUrl"> 
    <string>jdbc:hsqldb:hsql://localhost/xdb</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="dbConfigurations"> 
    <void property="configName"> 
     <string>HSQLdb</string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="password"> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="username"> 
     <string>sa</string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>DB</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>DT__1_0__DB1</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category"> 
   <string>DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsReconnection</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>DB Connection</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>dbconnection.png</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.db.spi.outbound.DBManagedConnectionFactory</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>DB</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.spi.ManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>
    </ConfigurationObjects>
</ESBAdapterConfigurations>
</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java>
